prompt: A depth map of a city street, with a large white SUV in the center foreground (brightest), two pedestrians on the right sidewalk midground (mid-tones), traffic lights suspended upper center (mid-dark), and tall buildings in the far background (black).
prompt_refined: Generate a depth map of a city street. A large white SUV is positioned in the center foreground, rendered with the brightest white values. Two pedestrians are on the right sidewalk in the midground, appearing in mid-tone gray values. Traffic lights are suspended in the upper center, depicted in mid-dark gray. Tall buildings define the far background, represented by solid black.
objects: large white SUV (in the center foreground)
two pedestrians (on the right sidewalk in the midground)
traffic lights (suspended in the upper center)
